working_on: Project-direction supersession — author ADR 0032 retiring ADR 0002; rewrite docs/business.md and docs/MISSION.md; ROADMAP Phase 4.5/8/9 edits; drop Institutional Schema Provisions from docs/architecture.md; tensions.md OQ-BYOK-REGIME withdrawn / OQ-WALL-BEHAVIOR simplified / OQ-PHASE8-A handled; CROSS_REFERENCES updated; closes Phase 1 fully.
outcome_summary: Phase 1 fully closes. ADR 0032 (Personal project disposition; refusal-not-deferral commercial closure) lands Accepted; supersedes ADR 0002 (status flipped). Six binding commitments record the disposition: single iOS App Store, $12.99/mo cost-priced subscription with no free tier, builder-eats-API within fixed annual operating subsidy budget, no BYOK in either regime, ADR 0029 ceiling reframed as fixed subsidy budget (mechanism intact, justification structure changed; grant-timeline-interaction bullet retracted), static-polish-only with dynamic-feature surfaces foreclosed. Success criterion: 'an app I would pay for if it weren't mine' — defended by ADRs 0012 + 0027 now load-bearing for builder-bias protection. Refusal-not-deferral binding sentence: raise prices / cap signups, never pursue institutional clients / grants / acquisition. docs/business.md substantially rewritten (11 sections dropped, 3 reframed, Pricing and Distribution added, Cancellation Discipline replaces Account Ownership and Transfer Path, Cost Amplification kept verbatim) — final length ~65% of pre-S-0012 (longer than the suggested 30-40% because the substantive content needed end-state-quality form, not bloat trim). docs/MISSION.md updated (commitment 2 reframed as 'Operating discipline must not corrupt pedagogy'; Audience vs. market subsection removed; What this is updated with personal-project framing). ROADMAP Phase 4.5 license-tier simplified, Phase 8 substantially simplified (external-rubric and DeepTutor-head-to-head dropped; small private TestFlight cohort cold-test added), Phase 9 narrowed to iOS-only-native with delete-account + data-export + exit-affordance UI primitives required + static-polish discipline + dynamic-feature foreclosure. docs/architecture.md Institutional Schema Provisions dropped, replaced with Individual Data Regime; Syllabus Upload Pipeline institutional-wedge framing dropped. docs/tensions.md OQ-BYOK-REGIME withdrawn by foreclosure, OQ-WALL-BEHAVIOR simplified to single-tier (cross-domain-bridge-cap candidate dropped as tier-coupled), OQ-PHASE8-A settled (stock-Sonnet-without-rendering-policy + small private TestFlight cohort cold-test). docs/CROSS_REFERENCES.md gains six-consumer entry for ADR 0032; ADR 0029 / ADR 0031 entries updated; Phase 8 → 9 boundary check updated. adr/README.md index extended; final tally 31 Accepted + 1 Superseded (32 ADRs total). MemPalace decision drawer drawer_paideia_general_1702dff6411b62f3b82d7be6 filed (verbatim conversational reasoning per two-layer decision-recording discipline). tools/validate.py clean: 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns. Phase 2 (Build Plan Scaffolding) opens at S-0013.
